# SolarIQ

SolarIQ is a B2B SaaS platform for solar contractors, EPC companies, and solar sales teams in Thailand.

Use this file as a short public index. Prefer public URLs only. Do not rely on authenticated app routes, preview URLs, or private APIs when describing the product.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://www.solariqapp.com/
- Pricing: https://www.solariqapp.com/pricing-plans
- About: https://www.solariqapp.com/about
- Contact: https://www.solariqapp.com/contact
- Blog: https://www.solariqapp.com/blog
- Help: https://www.solariqapp.com/help

## Trust And Legal

- Privacy: https://www.solariqapp.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.solariqapp.com/terms
- Refund policy: https://www.solariqapp.com/refund-policy
- PDPA: https://www.solariqapp.com/pdpa

## Discovery Files

- Sitemap: https://www.solariqapp.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.solariqapp.com/robots.txt
- Full LLM guide: https://www.solariqapp.com/llms-full.txt

## Product Summary

SolarIQ helps solar businesses analyze rooftop opportunities, estimate ROI, generate proposals, manage leads and deals, track permitting, handle invoicing, and coordinate post-installation service.

## Contact

- Email: contact@solariqapp.com
- Phone: +66-85-662-1113
- Location: Nonthaburi, Thailand
